1748210.name: Lovely Animal Stories
1748210.description:
Lovely Animal Stories is a short game about cute animals. You have to pass 31 levels with simple tasks.

Each level consists of a mini-game and a small scene about cute animals.
Mini-games include: puzzles, mosaics, point and click, clicker and other genres.

The game was inspired by great artists:
@WAWAWICOMICS, @4AMSHOWER, @CATSCAFECOMICS, @jangandfox.

Please visit their awesome Instagram profiles.

Duration of the game: 20-30 minutes.
1748210.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语
